response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:04: Identified 'Rolling Girl' by wowaka via on-screen text. Performer: Raora Panthera. 2. 00:04-02:34: Scene changes to talking/concert atmosphere with no vocal music. 3. 02:34-04:59: Identified 'Connect' by ClariS via on-screen text. Performers: Raora Panthera and Ouro Kronii. 4. Searched for lyrics using original artists (wowaka, ClariS) and song titles to ensure accurate, complete results.
response.global_summary: A video capturing musical performances of "Rolling Girl" by Raora Panthera and "Connect" by Raora Panthera and Ouro Kronii, interspersed with a talking segment where the performer discusses her birthday.

scenes.description: Raora Panthera performs 'Rolling Girl' with pink stage lights and virtual effects. Text on screen shows 'ローリンガール' (Rolling Girl).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ロンリーガールはいつまでも
届かない夢見てLonely Girl
騒ぐ頭の中を掻き回して、掻き回して。
「問題ない。」と呟いて、言葉は失われた?
もう失敗、もう失敗。
間違い探しに終われば、また、回るの!
もう一回、もう一回。
「私は今日も転がります。」と、
少女は言う
言葉に意味を奏でながら!
「もういいかい?」
「まだですよ、まだまだ先は見えないので。
息を止めるの、今。」
ローリンガールの成れの果て
届かない、向こうの色
重なる声と声を混ぜ合わせて、混ぜ合わせて。
「問題ない。」と呟いて、言葉は失われた?
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The lonely girl, dreaming of a future she can never reach.
She stirs her agitated mind, stirs it round and round.
Murmuring, "no problem," have the words been lost?
Another failure, another failure.
When the game of "spot the difference" is over, she turns again!
One more time, one more time.
"Today, I will roll again," the girl says,
Putting meaning into her words!
"Ready yet?" "Not yet, I can't see ahead still.
Hold your breath, now."
Rolling Girl, at the end of it all,
The unreaching, the color on the other side.
Mixing up voice after voice, mixing them round and round.
"No problem," she murmurs, words lost once more.

scenes.description: Performance stage visual with instrumental background music while Raora Panthera introduces her segment.
Raora Panthera and Ouro Kronii perform 'Connect'. Text on screen shows 'コネクト' (Connect).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
交わした約束忘れないよ 目を閉じ確かめる
押し寄せた闇 振り払って進むよ
いつになったらなくした未来を 私ここでまた見ることできるの?
溢れ出した不安の影を何度でも裂いて
この世界歩んでこう

とめどなく刻まれた 時は今始まり告げ
変わらない思いをのせ 閉ざされた扉開けよう
目覚めた心は走り出した未来を描くため
難しい道で立ち止まっても
空はきれいな青さでいつも待っててくれる

だから怖くない もう何があっても挫けない
振り返れば仲間がいて
気がつけば優しく包まれてた
何もかもが歪んだ世界で
唯一信じれるここが救いだった

喜びも悲しみもわけあえば強まる想い
この声が届くのなら
きっと奇跡はおこせるだろう
交わした約束忘れないよ 目を閉じ確かめる
押し寄せた闇 振り払って進むよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I won't forget the promise we exchanged, I close my eyes to confirm.
I'll brush away the gathered darkness and move forward.
When will I be able to see the lost future here again?
I tear through the shadows of anxiety that have overflowed, again and again.
I will walk through this world.
The time that was carved unceasingly now signals the beginning.
With these unchanging feelings, let's open the closed door.
The awakened heart has started running, to draw a future.
Even if I stop on a difficult path,
The sky is a beautiful blue and will always be waiting for me.
So I'm not afraid, no matter what happens, I won't lose heart.
If I look back, I have friends,
And realized I was being gently wrapped up.
In a world where everything is distorted,
This place I can believe in was my only salvation.
If we share both joy and sadness, these feelings will become stronger.
If this voice reaches you,
Surely a miracle can happen.
I won't forget the promise we exchanged, I close my eyes to confirm.
I'll brush away the gathered darkness and move forward.
